name: Camp Cobbler Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine fruit and tapioca in a 12-inch foil-lined Dutch oven.
2. Sprinkle cake mix evenly over the fruit mixture.
3. Sprinkle brown sugar over the cake mix.
4. Dab butter all over the top of the brown sugar.
5. Place the lid on the Dutch oven.
6. Bake over 6 to 8 coals on the bottom and 14 to 16 coals on the top for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until the top is browned and the cake has absorbed juices and is no longer dry.
